function.message: I can’t process the next inbox message because the required preflight pipeline is unavailable in this workspace right now. `preflight_schema` repeatedly fails to discover roots (inbox/entities/outbox are null), so I cannot legally call `preflight_inbox` or access inbox content.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required preflight protocol first; did not perform read/search/write beyond allowed steps. Stopped when mandatory schema discovery remained unavailable.
function.outcome_justification: Two `preflight_schema` attempts both returned null roots and a protocol error (`TreeRequest has no "path" field`), which blocks all task-relevant actions under enforced preflight rules.
